name: Mexican Pita Pockets
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Van Camp's Pork and Beans (undrained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the lean ground beef with chopped onion until no longer pink.
2. Drain excess fat from the meat mixture.
3. Add the undrained Pork and Beans, stirring to combine.
4. Continue cooking until heated through.
5. Spoon about half a cup of the mixture into each pita pocket half.
6. Top each pocket with lettuce, tomato, cheddar cheese, and plain yogurt.
7. Optionally add additional salsa for extra flavor.
Nutritional Analysis per serving:
calories 329
carbohydrates 33 g
protein 20 g
fat 13 g
calcium 198 mg
sodium 610 mg
cholesterol 45 mg
dietary fiber 11 g
